name: Rikka Queen Strenna
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ストレナエ
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 Plant monster or "Rikka" card in your GY; add it to your hand. If this card with Xyz Material is Tributed: You can Special Summon 1 Rank 5 or higher Plant Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck or GY, then you can attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Rikka Queen Strenna" once per turn.

action: Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material

summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
